about.headline: About us
about.title: About AJSEE | Global events without language barriers

hero.text: Experiences know no boundaries. That’s why AJSEE was born.
hero.subtext: Our goal is to make cultural, entertainment and sporting events from around the world easier to discover — clearly, intuitively and without unnecessary barriers when exploring events, tickets and travel options.
hero.claim: AJSEE<sup>®</sup> is a modern platform for everyone who wants to experience the world to the fullest — without unnecessary obstacles.

story.headline: How it all began
story.p1: It was autumn 2024. We were sitting in a pub, having a beer – and as it happens, one ordinary conversation sparked something that soon turned into a real idea.
story.p2: That same evening, the name AJSEE, the first logo draft and the vision were born: to make global experiences easier to access without language barriers.
story.p3: Then came the hardest part: to actually start.
story.p4: We both had full-time jobs, lived 180 kilometres apart, and time was short. The project stalled before it could even get going.
story.p5: Until one day, one of us just launched it. Without a perfect plan, but with the certainty that it made sense. And that’s when AJSEE started becoming real.

adam.name: Adam Brázda
adam.claim: Part of AJSEE® from the very first idea. He believes in simple solutions that open the world of experiences without unnecessary barriers.

jan.name: Jan Oujezdský
jan.claim: From day one, he has shared the vision to make culture, sport and entertainment accessible to as many people as possible. At AJSEE®, he connects ideas, accessibility and attention to detail.

future.headline: 🎯 Where we’re heading
future.p1: In 2026, we are expanding the content, partnerships and technical foundation of the platform.
future.p2: We are developing language versions, practical guides and partnerships with international platforms.
future.p3: Step by step, we want to expand the selection of events, related services and accessibility for a wider audience.
future.p4: We want AJSEE to become a first-choice starting point for anyone looking for global experiences — whether in London, Barcelona or closer to home.
